arts.ttl: Chelsea's summer transfer window 'priority' for Enzo Maresca revealed as club look to sell numerous stars
arts.sum: Chelsea will be active in the summer but they will also reportedly be looking to sell numerous players ahead of what is likely to be a busy window.

arts.ttl: How Arsenal's next five fixtures compare to Liverpool's after slender Chelsea win
arts.sum: How Arsenal's next five Premier League fixtures compare to runaway leaders Liverpool after the Gunners beat Chelsea 1-0 on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Man Utd receive Osimhen update as Isak to Arsenal heats up
arts.sum: Man Utd receive Osimhen update as Isak to Arsenal heats up Marc Guehi is "expected" to secure a big-money transfer this summer amid interest from Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool and Man Utd.

arts.ttl: Merino returns Arsenal to winning ways with victory over Chelsea
arts.sum: Mikel Merino's first-half header proved the difference as Arsenal strengthened their grip on second place in the Premier League with a 1-0 victory over rivals Chelsea . Enzo Maresca's side did not improve much after the break as Merino almost doubled his tally, and Arsenal's lead, with a second-half volley that forced Robert Sanchez into a fine stop as the hosts ran out comfortable winners.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed Alexander Isak boost as 'IMPOSSIBLE transfer' targeted
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly targeting an “impossible transfer” for Atletico Madrid forward Julian Alvarez, which could inadvertently help Arsenal ’s chances of securing a deal for Alexander Isak . The Newcastle forward is wanted by both Barcelona and Liverpool, although Arsenal have identified him as a serious candidate to solve their centre forward woes and they are expected to submit a big-money offer during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca claims one Chelsea attacker did 'quite well' against Arsenal, he didn't register a single shot
Chelsea midfield plan after £18.5m signing agreed with four Maresca exits
arts.sum: A defensive midfielder that can also play further forward, Essugo is set to compete with Moises Caicedo, Romeo Lavia and Enzo Fernandez for a place in the Chelsea starting XI next season. They should remain as Chelsea's top two midfielders for next season with Lavia, Santos and Essugo joining them as part of the first-team squad.

arts.ttl: Arteta issues BAFFLING Chelsea claim amid Maresca criticism
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has claimed that Chelsea are the “best attacking team in the league” following his side’s 1-0 win over the Blues. Mikel Merino netted the only goal of the game at the Emirates Stadium on Sunday afternoon, with Chelsea mustering just two shots on target and generating a mere 0.35 xG against Arteta’s men.

arts.ttl: Alex Iwobi has just aimed a five-word dig at Tottenham that Arsenal fans will love - opinion
arts.sum: Along with enjoying their win over Chelsea at the Emirates Stadium, one or two Arsenal fans might have also revelled in Tottenham Hotspur’s defeat in...

arts.ttl: 'The solution': Gary Cahill asks question of Chelsea defender for Mikel Merino's goal for Arsenal
arts.sum: Could he have stopped it going in?
